SELECT
    (SELECT min_total FROM segment_min WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT min_total FROM segment_min WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_minus_LAM,
    (SELECT min_total FROM segment_min WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT min_total FROM segment_min WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_minus_KAM,
    (SELECT min_total FROM segment_min WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT min_total FROM segment_min WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_minus_SME
FROM (
    WITH cust_totals AS (
        SELECT c.CustomerID,
               c.Segment,
               SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
        FROM customers c
        JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
        WHERE substr(ym.Date, 1, 6) BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
        GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
    ),
    segment_min AS (
        SELECT Segment,
               MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total
        FROM cust_totals
        GROUP BY Segment
    )
    SELECT 1
) AS dummy;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH seg_year AS (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         substr(ym.Date,1,4) AS Year,
         SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
  GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(ym.Date,1,4)
),
pivot AS (
  SELECT
    Segment,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Year='2012' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2012,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Year='2013' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2013
  FROM seg_year
  GROUP BY Segment
),
calc AS (
  SELECT
    Segment,
    (cons_2013 - cons_2012) AS increase,
    CASE WHEN cons_2013 != 0 THEN ((cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2013) END AS pct_increase
  FROM pivot
)
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM calc
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM calc)
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM calc
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM calc);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT
  ((last_sec - champ_sec) / last_sec) * 100.0 AS percent_faster
FROM (
  SELECT
    (CAST(SUBSTR(ch.time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(ch.time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(ch.time,7,2) AS INTEGER) +
     CAST(SUBSTR(ch.time,10) AS REAL)/1000.0) AS champ_sec,
    (CAST(SUBSTR(ld.time,1,2) AS INTEGER)*3600 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(ld.time,4,2) AS INTEGER)*60 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(ld.time,7,2) AS INTEGER) +
     CAST(SUBSTR(ld.time,10) AS REAL)/1000.0) AS last_sec
  FROM
    (SELECT r.time
     FROM results r
     WHERE r.raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name LIKE '%Australian Grand Prix%')
       AND r.driverId = (
         SELECT ds.driverId
         FROM driverStandings ds
         JOIN races rr ON ds.raceId = rr.raceId
         WHERE rr.year = 2008
         ORDER BY ds.points DESC
         LIMIT 1
       )
       AND r.time IS NOT NULL) ch,
    (SELECT r.time
     FROM results r
     WHERE r.raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name LIKE '%Australian Grand Prix%')
       AND r.time IS NOT NULL
     ORDER BY r.position DESC, r.positionOrder DESC
     LIMIT 1) ld
);	----- bird -----	formula_1
